## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` is clean
- [ ] `bunx tsc --noEmit` is clean
- [ ] `bun run test` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` + `bun run lint:ext` are clean
- [ ] E2E run (`bun run test:e2e`) if capture/UI behavior changed
- [ ] Docs in `docs/` and `CHANGELOG.md` updated if behavior or architecture changed
